name: Jobs
description: Job management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and managing job instances based on job templates.

request.description:
Create a new job instance based on a job template.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Request Body:**
- templateId (long, required): The job template ID to use
- customerId (long, required): The customer associated with this job
- clientId (long, optional): The client associated with this job
- assignedWorkerId (long, optional): The worker assigned to this job
- status (string, required): Job status (e.g., NEW, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED)
- fieldValues (object, required): Map of field ID to value (e.g., {"101": "John Doe", "102": "Medium"})
- assetIds (array of long, optional): IDs of assets to assign to this job

**Business Logic:**
- Job is associated with the company of the authenticated user
- Must reference a valid template ID
- Customer must belong to the same company (required field)
- Client and worker must belong to the same company
- All required template fields must have values in fieldValues
- Assets must be available, not archived, and belong to the same company
- Asset assignment will mark assets as unavailable

**Response:** Created job object with id, companyId, templateId, customerId, clientId, assignedWorkerId, status, archived flag, timestamps, fieldValues, and assetIds

**Status Code:** 201 Created

Retrieve all jobs for the authenticated company.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Response:** Array of job objects

**Note:** Returns all jobs (including archived) belonging to the company.

**Status Code:** 200 OK

response.name: Get All Jobs - Success

request.description:
Retrieve a specific job by ID.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Job ID

**Response:** Job object (same format as Create Job response)

**Authorization:** Only jobs belonging to the authenticated company can be accessed.

**Status Code:** 200 OK

Update an existing job.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Job ID

**Request Body:**
- customerId (long, optional): The customer associated with this job
- clientId (long, optional): The client associated with this job
- assignedWorkerId (long, optional): The worker assigned to this job
- status (string, optional): Job status (NEW, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED)
- archived (boolean, optional): Archive status
- fieldValues (object, optional): Map of field ID to updated values
- workflowId (long, optional): ID of the workflow to assign to this job

**Business Logic:**
- Only jobs belonging to the authenticated company can be updated
- Customer must belong to the same company
- Client and worker must belong to the same company
- Cannot change the template after creation
- workflowId can only be set if the job currently has no workflow assigned. Once a workflow is assigned to a job it cannot be changed or replaced. Sending a workflowId on a job that already has a workflow returns 400 Bad Request with the message "Workflow cannot be changed once assigned to a job"
- Omitting workflowId (or sending it as null) leaves the existing workflow assignment untouched

**Response:** Updated job object

**Status Code:** 200 OK

response.name: Update Job - Error: Workflow Already Assigned (400)

request.description:
Soft delete (archive) a job by ID.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Job ID

**Response:** 204 No Content

**Business Logic:**
- Sets job.archived = true
- Job remains in database but is marked as archived
- Archived jobs still appear in getAllJobs() but are marked as archived

**Authorization:** Only jobs belonging to the authenticated company can be deleted.

**Status Code:** 204 No Content

Retrieve all jobs for a specific job template.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Path Parameter:**
- templateId (long): Job Template ID

**Response:** Array of job objects (same format as Get All Jobs response)

**Note:** Returns all jobs (including archived) belonging to the authenticated company that were created from the specified template.

**Authorization:** Only jobs belonging to the authenticated company can be accessed.

**Status Code:** 200 OK

response.name: Get Jobs by Template - Success
